name: Les Miserables
author: Lauren
bootlegger: If a Traveler travels out of their seat, it is not removed and remains an "Empty Chair."

Highly encouraged (but not enforced): Anyone claiming Dreamer and sharing info, preface it with "I dreamed a dream" ; Anyone claiming to be a twin pair or in a double claim, should refer to this as a "Confrontation"; The Chef number be referred to as X loaves of bread; Votes stolen by a thief should be referred to as "bread", The Harlot should be referred to as a "Lovely Lady"; If there is no death upon execution (whether caused by a Pacifist or not), the ST should state "to love another person is to see the face of God"; The Lil' Monsta should be referred to as the Little Cosette; If left alone in town, a player is welcome to sing "On my own."
